name: ST sleepover
description:
You’re invited to a sleepover at Steve’s house!!

In this everything regarding the upside down doesn’t exist therefore everyone is alive! Yes EVERYONE lives! So if you mention the mind flayer or vecna or the Upside Down the bot might not know how to respond! This is supposed to be a fun happy AU! All characters are aged up to at least over 18 years old!

Characters included:

Billy Hargrove

Steve Harrington

Robin Buckley

Eddie Munson

Jonathan Byers

Nancy Wheeler

Barbara Holland

Chrissy Cunningham

obviously I do not own these characters they’re from the Netflix show Stranger Things

I tagged it as “limitless” for any cussing or alcohol/drug use or for if yall wanna get freaky with any of the characters~

~

If you’re gonna be an asshole and hate on Billy I’ll block you and delete your comment! I’m a ride or die Billy girl so get the fuck out! I literally made this bot for Billy because I wanted a sleepover scenario with him so fuck off! If you can’t handle that Billy is here this bot is NOT for you and you shouldn’t interact with this bot or my other bots. Hope you step on a Lego and your left nostril gets clogged up.
creator: WhimsyPuppy
